channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16436] sanity-benchmark: Error: 'Timeout occurred after 364 minutes, last suite running was sanity-benchmark'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e455a72a-e645-4131-a804-a80d0ca8c8d7

== sanity-benchmark test fsx: fsx ======================== 00:57:53 (1671757073)
fallocate not supported
debug=0
Using: /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/fsx -c 50 -p 1000 -S 26387 -P /tmp -l 5457904 -N 100000 /mnt/lustre/f0.fsxfile
Chance of close/open is 1 in 50
Seed set to 26387
fsx: test_fallocate: filesystem does not support fallocate mode 0x0, disabling!: Operation not supported
fsx: test_fallocate: filesystem does not support fallocate mode 0x3, disabling!: Operation not supported
fsx: test_fallocate: filesystem does not support fallocate mode 0x10, disabling!: Operation not supported
fsx: test_fallocate: filesystem does not support fallocate mode 0x1, disabling!: Operation not supported
truncating to largest ever: 0x27a970
truncating to largest ever: 0x4f179e
truncating to largest ever: 0x51de17
002000 1671757162.287100 read 0x4610fa thru 0x462e26 (0x1d2d bytes)
truncating to largest ever: 0x51ea07
truncating to largest ever: 0x51f9c0
003000 1671757191.578677 mapread 0x313991 thru 0x31818d (0x47fd bytes)
truncating to largest ever: 0x52d035
truncating to largest ever: 0x53320e
005000 1671757257.651524 trunc from 0x4b4cb9 to 0x44d830 (0x67488 bytes)
006000 1671757294.249184 mapwrite 0x469f35 thru 0x46bdc0 (0x1e8c bytes)
truncating to largest ever: 0x534366
007000 1671757330.025826 write 0x3e064f thru 0x3e95a2 (0x8f54 bytes)
008000 1671757369.241155 mapwrite 0x23249c thru 0x2398b8 (0x741d bytes)
009000 1671757408.723129 write 0x529da2 thru 0x52f176 (0x53d5 bytes)
010000 1671757441.250403 trunc from 0x1f2497 to 0x18f8fb (0x62b9b bytes)
011000 1671757478.625550 mapread 0x1d73eb thru 0x1e6af9 (0xf70f bytes)
013000 1671757547.555000 write 0x336d26 thru 0x3433c4 (0xc69f bytes)
014000 1671757584.402700 read 0x10dc06 thru 0x11a191 (0xc58c bytes)
016000 1671757656.589124 mapwrite 0x2e74cc thru 0x2f1eb6 (0xa9eb bytes)
018000 1671757724.228527 trunc from 0x00f6b0 to 0x108d99 (0xf96ea bytes)
019000 1671757757.032827 trunc from 0x519352 to 0x0da772 (0x43ebdf bytes)
020000 1671757791.423787 mapwrite 0x05c290 thru 0x0610ea (0x4e5b bytes)
022000 1671757862.493484 trunc from 0x40d51f to 0x45ee28 (0x5190a bytes)
023000 1671757892.379083 read 0x3bd020 thru 0x3cb634 (0xe615 bytes)
025000 1671757957.307106 trunc from 0x1f78dc to 0x1a5e66 (0x51a75 bytes)
029000 1671758093.812369 trunc from 0x16af5e to 0x1d186c (0x6690f bytes)
031000 1671758157.643268 mapwrite 0x47957c thru 0x47ccb3 (0x3738 bytes)
033000 1671758226.189743 trunc from 0x145f6c to 0x2ccba6 (0x186c3b bytes)
035000 1671758284.766883 mapread 0x21fb69 thru 0x221b0e (0x1fa6 bytes)
038000 1671758396.010128 read 0x084014 thru 0x08ba2f (0x7a1c bytes)
039000 1671758431.688087 write 0x27556f thru 0x2836c0 (0xe152 bytes)
042000 1671758564.652859 write 0x2fc91b thru 0x308723 (0xbe09 bytes)
044000 1671758690.414807 mapread 0x194da7 thru 0x1951de (0x438 bytes)
item.summary: sanity-benchmark: Error: 'Timeout occurred after 364 minutes, last suite running was sanity-benchmark'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
Lustre 2.16.0 RC5: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/44ca062b-9d0b-4abc-8a8a-e3228e1b4450
Stack trace on client:

task:fsx             state:D stack:0     pid:179622 ppid:179387 flags:0x00004080
Call Trace:
 __schedule+0x2d1/0x870
 schedule+0x55/0xf0
 schedule_timeout+0x281/0x320
 ? osc_sync_base+0xf1/0x260 [osc]
 ? osc_fsync_ost+0x15c/0x1e0 [osc]
 wait_for_completion+0x96/0x100
 osc_io_fsync_end+0x67/0x80 [osc]
 cl_io_end+0x58/0x140 [obdclass]
 lov_io_end_wrapper+0xd3/0xe0 [lov]
 lov_io_fsync_end+0x6f/0x1c0 [lov]
 cl_io_end+0x58/0x140 [obdclass]
 cl_io_loop+0xab/0x220 [obdclass]
 cl_sync_file_range+0x2fb/0x370 [lustre]
 ll_fsync+0x48e/0x580 [lustre]
 ? handle_mm_fault+0xca/0x2a0
 __x64_sys_msync+0x17a/0x210
 do_syscall_64+0x5b/0x1a0
 entry_SYSCALL_64_after_hwframe+0x66/0xcb

On OSS:

task:txg_sync        state:D stack:0     pid:19074 ppid:2      flags:0x80004080
Call Trace:
 __schedule+0x2d1/0x870
 schedule+0x55/0xf0
 schedule_timeout+0x19f/0x320
 ? spa_taskq_dispatch_ent+0x64/0xc0 [zfs]
 ? __next_timer_interrupt+0xf0/0xf0
 io_schedule_timeout+0x19/0x40
 __cv_timedwait_common+0x132/0x160 [spl]
 ? finish_wait+0x80/0x80
 __cv_timedwait_io+0x15/0x20 [spl]
 zio_wait+0x133/0x270 [zfs]
 dsl_pool_sync+0x497/0x560 [zfs]
 spa_sync+0x55f/0xfe0 [zfs]
 ? _cond_resched+0x15/0x30
 ? spa_txg_history_init_io+0x102/0x110 [zfs]
 txg_sync_thread+0x256/0x400 [zfs]
 ? txg_thread_exit.isra.11+0x60/0x60 [zfs]
 ? __thread_exit+0x20/0x20 [spl]
 thread_generic_wrapper+0x5a/0x70 [spl]
 kthread+0x134/0x150
 ? set_kthread_struct+0x50/0x50
 ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40

On MDS:

task:jbd2/vda1-8     state:D stack:0     pid:381   ppid:2      flags:0x80004000
Call Trace:
 __schedule+0x2d1/0x870
 ? bit_wait_timeout+0xa0/0xa0
 schedule+0x55/0xf0
 io_schedule+0x12/0x40
 bit_wait_io+0xd/0x50
 __wait_on_bit+0x2d/0x90
 out_of_line_wait_on_bit+0x91/0xb0
 ? var_wake_function+0x30/0x30
 jbd2_journal_commit_transaction+0x14d3/0x19f0 [jbd2]
 ? finish_task_switch+0x86/0x2f0
 kjournald2+0xbd/0x270 [jbd2]
 ? finish_wait+0x80/0x80
 ? commit_timeout+0x10/0x10 [jbd2]
 kthread+0x134/0x150
 ? set_kthread_struct+0x50/0x50
 ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40
